item.title: Micron’s Run Isn’t Over—3 Signals Point to More Upside
item.description: Micron is positioned to rocket higher upon its next catalyst, potentially rising another 100% by year's end as AI demand drives business.

item.title: Rivian Posts Biggest Gain Since IPO After Q4 2025 Earnings
item.description: Rivian shares just posted their largest single day gain in over four years. All eyes are on the company's R2 demand and deliveries as 2026 gets underw...

item.title: MCD and TXRH: 2 Low-Risk Restaurant Stocks With Upside
item.description: The restaurant sector has become highly competitive as consumers increasingly seek value, with McDonald's and Texas Roadhouse leading the way.

item.title: Is This Quantum Outperformer a New Threat to D-Wave?
item.description: Quantum Computing may seem like a standout because it has fallen less than its quantum rivals, but QUBT comes with some significant warning signs.

item.title: AEHR's +25% Spike: Latest AI Hyperscaler Order Improves Outlook
item.description: See what caused small cap semiconductor stock AEHR to soar in February, and what the firm's latest announcement means going forward.
